name: leadgen_contacts
description: Retrieve existing contacts, clients, jobs, and connections from the lead generation database
description_for_agent: Use this skill to retrieve existing contacts from the lead generation database. You can filter by type (clients, jobs, connections), status, industry, relationship, and search by keywords. Use this to check what contacts already exist before searching for new ones.

contact_type.description: Type of contacts to retrieve: clients, jobs, connections, or all

search.description: Optional search query to filter results

status.description: Filter by status (e.g., new, contacted, qualified, converted for clients)

limit.description: Max number of results to return (default: 50)
